extensionAttribute.scriptContentsMac:
#!/bin/bash
: << DOC EA to determine whether Rosetta is installed. Possible results: "installed" - arm64 Mac - Rosetta is installed "missing" - arm64 Mac - Rosetta is not installed "ineligible" - Intel Mac - Rosetta cannot be installed DOC
# is this an ARM Mac? arch=$(/usr/bin/arch) if [ "$arch" == "arm64" ]; then # is rosetta 2 installed? if [[ -f "/Library/Apple/System/Library/LaunchDaemons/com.apple.oahd.plist" ]]; then result="installed" else result="missing" fi else result="ineligible" fi
echo "<result>$result</result>"
